title: Nagwa
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''Nagwa''''' was an [[Agave-class picket ship|''Agave''-class picket]] dispatched to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]]'s task force during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] attempt to capture the [[Teljkon Vagabond]]. After receiving minor damage during the failed capture attempt at [[Gmar Askilon]], ''Nagwa'' was ordered back to drydock.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
